pose_notes: Beak touches wing feathers in frames 2-4.
Add 1-2 feather pixels flicking out in frame 4 using #FFA300.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 200x40px (5 frames × 40x40) with 0px spacing.
Animation plays at 3fps and respects loop/play_count settings in specs.animation.
Sprite remains readable at 1x scale on a 128x128 canvas; no anti-aliasing and only listed colors are used.
shared_properties: Echo keeps crest, cheek patch, beak, and tail readable in every occupied frame.
Body footprint stays inside 40x40px and remains centered near x44 y42.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
differences: State_preening uses 5 frames at 3fps for a grooming cycle.
Beak contact shifts across wing and chest feather zones in multiple frames.
Body tilt shifts 2px while the feet stay anchored on the perch line.
